title: Prove reconciliation effects are crash-atomic and replay-safe
preconditions: A real temporary store, registered statement evidence, exact-match, statement-correction, statement-only, ambiguity, decision-replacement, and coverage inputs, plus injectable failures at each write boundary.
steps: Inject failure before and after replacement creation, supersession, category/pool carry-forward, payment carry-forward or unknown initialization, relationship replacement, decision append, evidence link, current-state derivation, coverage write, idempotency write, and commit; restart and replay each request.
expected: Restart shows either the full disposition including replacement, dimensions, and relationship effects exactly once or the unchanged prior state; no duplicate active event, orphan replacement, partial carry-forward, broken relationship, dangling link/decision, partial coverage, or lost idempotency outcome exists.
cleanup: Delete only the temporary test generation.
